nasb.text: For He has brought low those who dwell on high, the unassailable city; He lays it low, He lays it low to the ground, He casts it to the dust.

esv.text: For he has humbled the inhabitants of the height, the lofty city. He lays it low, lays it low to the ground, casts it to the dust.

cnv.text: 他使那些驕傲的降卑，使那些高聳的城敗落； 把它拆毀，散在地上，變作塵土。

ccb.text: 祂贬抑高傲的人， 拆毁他们高耸的城邑， 把它们夷为平地、化为尘土，

csbs.text: 耶和华必使居高处的， 就是居于高耸城中的人降为卑， 又使城落败、一败涂地、坠入尘土——
